layer3_inference: Atlas Foundation hidden moves — emergency capital-raising
rejection_reason: Layer 3 correctly self-rejected this inference per corrections ledger (CL-001, CL-004, CL-006). Layer 4 concurs. Three correction entries across multiple cycles have prohibited this identical inference. Zero observable evidence supports it. The inference is generated by incentive logic alone (the Foundation 'should' be seeking capital), but incentive logic without evidence is assumption, not inference. Layer 4 affirms the rejection.

layer3_inference: Facility Operators hidden moves — wind-down planning or recovery strategy
rejection_reason: Layer 3 correctly self-rejected per corrections ledger (CL-002, CL-003, CL-007). Three correction entries prohibit inferring internal Operator planning. The 0% yield is consistent with multiple explanations and per corrections protocol, the observable outcome is scored, not the hypothesized motivation. Layer 4 affirms.

layer3_inference: Regulatory Bodies hidden moves — impending enforcement or investigation
rejection_reason: 4 assumptions required per LZ-EPH-003: (1) regulators aware, (2) jurisdiction exists, (3) will act, (4) action would affect outcome. Zero observable evidence. Correctly classified SPECULATIVE by Layer 3 and stripped per burden of proof by Layer 4. Historical correlation between conditions and regulatory action (per LZ-RC-001) does not establish causation and does not overcome the 4-assumption barrier.
